race.comment: IDLE FLYER (3) progressive mare who graduated quickly with a Group 3 win in the Spring. Resumes with excellent fresh credentials and maps to get the gun run with regular rider going on. Given the two trials and can return on a winning note. GANGSTA GRANNY (2) talented Group winning mare who finished second to Autumn Glow first-up in the Toy Show last August. Has the speed to get across from the wide gate and the booking of J Mac is a good lead. Fitted with the two sound trials and this is her pet trip. EAGLE EXPRESS (13) progressive mare thrown in the deep end today. Third-up now on the limit and can surprise some of her more fancied rivals at the good odds. SNOW IN MAY (7) unlucky mare not to have a few more wins on the CV. Resumes with the two trials and stays in the mix.

favourite.name: Gangsta Granny
favourite.owners: A E Koundouris & Mrs G Koundouris
